title: Expert Panel on Youth Employment - Canada.ca
content:
## Expert Panel on Youth Employment
Budget  2016 announced the creation an Expert Panel on Youth Employment to assess the  barriers faced by vulnerable youth in finding and keeping jobs, and to examine  innovative practices used by governments, nongovernmental organizations and  employers both at home and abroad to improve job opportunities for vulnerable  youth.

## Services and information

### 13 ways to modernize youth employment in Canada
Strategies for a New World of Work - Final report from the Expert Panel on Youth Employment

### Understanding the realities: Youth employment in Canada
Interim report of the Expert Panel on youth employment

### Privacy notice statement
Consent  and privacy notice statement.
The  Expert Panel on Youth Employment will help us to understand the challenges that  youth face in finding and keeping jobs and to identify promising and innovative  approaches to helping all youth transition successfully into the workforce.

## About the Expert Panel on Youth Employment
- Panel member biographies
